wikidata_candidates.label: Charles Davidson
wikidata_candidates.reasoning: The two records describe different individuals. The card record details an American electrical engineer living in Brooklyn, New York, who worked for Western Electric. The Wikidata record describes an Australian politician and dairy farmer who served in the Australian House of Representatives. Their locations and professional identities do not overlap.
